caption: The video features L. Carlos Lara, CEO of United Services and Trust Corporation, speaking at an event in Nashville, TN on April 14, 2018. The topic of discussion is "Trump's Economy: Boom Times or Dangerous Bubble?" Lara, dressed in a formal blue suit with a white shirt and tie, stands behind a microphone, addressing an audience. The setting appears to be indoors with large windows allowing natural light to illuminate the scene. The audience members, partially visible in the foreground, seem attentive as Lara delivers his speech, likely analyzing the economic policies and their potential impacts during the Trump administration. The atmosphere suggests a professional and serious discourse on economic matters.
